# SelectOption

A minimal generic label-value contract shared by baked selection controls.

## Usage

Set the generic value type when an option uses numeric ids, enums, or another application value. It defaults to `string`.

```typescript
import type { SelectOption } from '@stacktrace/ui'

const plans: SelectOption<number>[] = [
  { label: 'Starter', value: 1 },
  { label: 'Professional', value: 2 },
]
```

## `SelectOption`

Pairs a human-readable label with the value stored by a selection control.

```typescript
type SelectOption<V = string> = {
  label: string
  value: V
}
```

| Property | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `label` (required) | `string` | Provides the human-readable option label. |
| `value` (required) | `V` | Provides the value represented by the option. |

Hosted documentation: [SelectOption](https://ui.stacktrace.sk/docs/types/select-option)
